rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"All target routes were already protected with withAuth before the task began; the real work was identifying residual gaps.","scope":"auth middleware"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"withAuth HOC had no unit tests and protected endpoints had no integration tests — a common gap when auth is added incrementally.","scope":"auth middleware"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Role type mismatch between UserStore.UserRole and withAuth's expected roles is a common footgun when auth is wired up across layers.","scope":"auth / type safety"}]}
